'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 113''' is the one hundred thirteenth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[February 25]], [[2004]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*[[Freedon Nadd Uprising]]
*[[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]]
*[[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raiders]] - [[Bantha/Legends|Bantha's]]
*[[Khaleen Hentz/Legends|Khaleen Hentz]]
*[[Shmi Skywalker Lars/Legends|Shmi Skywalker]]
*[[Aurra Sing/Legends|Aurra Sing]]
*[[Zeltron/Legends|Zeltrons]]
*[[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]]
*[[Death Star II/Legends|Death Star II]] - Reactor
*Weapons and equipment of Aurra Sing
*Naval Tactics
